description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped garden areas. The front features a driveway leading to a covered carport with a pergola structure, and the entrance is flanked by lush greenery and small trees. The building has large windows and sliding glass doors, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor seating and additional landscaping, while the side yards are lined with grass and flower beds. The exterior walls are finished in a clean white color, complemented by gray and natural wood accents. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor integration, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, landscaped gardens, large windows, and a covered carport. Features include a patio, pergola, and open-plan layout with strong indoor-outdoor connections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport with pergola, main entrance, and lush front landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, flat roof, and boundary wall with visible trees and garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, outdoor seating, and flower beds along the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the carport, side garden, and additional trees along the boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
